description: Curated index of reusable markdown templates.
source_of_truth_note: Template files are authoritative; this registry helps fresh sessions find them.

items.name: Prompt Template Library
items.purpose: Provide reusable copyable prompts for routine prompt runs, audits, preflights, handoffs, repairs, promotion reviews, role assignments, reviews, and commit packaging.
items.safe_use_notes: Prompt templates are reusable launch prompts, not a second promptset; fill placeholders with concrete values before use.

items.name: Contract Templates
items.purpose: Provide task, result, review, and escalation contract skeletons.
items.safe_use_notes: Contracts should be filled with concrete scope and evidence before use.

items.name: Handoff Templates
items.purpose: Scaffold temporary bridge handoffs and repair checklists.
items.safe_use_notes: Use only when a handoff materially helps the next session.

items.name: Memory Templates
items.purpose: Scaffold memory update, handoff summary, and promotion records.
items.safe_use_notes: Memory templates require explicit review before promotion.

items.name: Report Templates
items.purpose: Scaffold completion audit and readiness reports.
items.safe_use_notes: Reports should cite concrete files and commands.

items.name: Run Manifest Template
items.purpose: Capture prompt id, run id, assistant, permission posture, and validation notes for a run.
items.safe_use_notes: Generated manifests are scaffolds until filled with actual run evidence.

items.name: Session Closeout Template
items.purpose: Provide a compact closeout record shape for session summaries.
items.safe_use_notes: Do not use closeout notes to mask incomplete validation.
